---
title: "Vidit_LDA_Exercise_WashU"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

## Data Cleaning

```{R}
# Libraries
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{R}
# Reading the datasets
# Baseline Data
base = read_csv(here("files", "baseline_df.csv"))
# Visits Data
vis = read_csv(here("files", "visits_df.csv"))
# Exits and Death Data
outcome = read_csv(here("files", "outcomes_df.csv"))

# Summary check for all datasets
summary(base)
print("---")
summary(vis)
print("---")
summary(outcome)

# View all of them
view(base)
view(vis)
view(outcome)
```

```{R}
# Data Cleaning, Manipulation and Merging
# Ignoring NAs or missingnes for now
# First cleaning base
base = base |>
  mutate(sex = as.factor(sex))
summary(base$sex)
# So, sex = 1, M, male, Male means males and otherwise female
base_clean = base |>
  mutate(male = factor(
  ifelse(sex %in% c(1, "M", "male", "Male"), 1, 0),
  levels = c(0, 1)
)) |>
  dplyr::select(-sex) |>
  mutate(entry_date = as.Date(entry_date, format = "%d-%b-%Y")) |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id))
summary(base_clean)

# Now cleaning vis
vis = vis |>
  mutate(visit_type = as.factor(visit_type))
summary(vis$visit_type)

vis_clean = vis |>
  mutate(
    visit_type = factor(tolower(as.character(visit_type))),
    id = as.character(id),
    visit_date = as.Date(visit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(starts_with("sbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 40, NA, .x)),
    across(starts_with("dbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 30, NA, .x))
  )
summary(vis_clean)

# Now cleaning outcome 
outcome = outcome |>
  mutate(exit_type = as.factor(exit_type))
summary(outcome$exit_type)

outcome_clean = outcome |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id),
    exit_date = as.Date(exit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"))

summary(outcome_clean)

# Joining the data!
full_data = base_clean |>
  left_join(vis_clean, by = "id") |>
  left_join(outcome_clean, by = "id")


full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    avg_sbp = rowMeans(cbind(sbp2, sbp3), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_dbp = rowMeans(cbind(dbp2, dbp3), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    a_med = as.factor(as.integer(
      if_any(
        c(amlodipine, bisoprolol, captopril, carvedilol,
          enalapril, furosemide, hctz, lisinopril,
          losaratan, metoprolol),
        ~ . == 1
      )
    ))
  )
summary(full_data)

write_csv(full_data, "files/full_data.csv")
```

```{R}
head(full_data, 20)
```

## Incident Hypertension

```{R}
# Copy data so original is not changed
table_data = full_data

# Sort by id and visit date
table_data = table_data %>% arrange(id, visit_date)

# Create average BP per visit
table_data = table_data %>%
  mutate(
    sbp = rowMeans(cbind(sbp1, sbp2, sbp3), na.rm = TRUE),
    dbp = rowMeans(cbind(dbp1, dbp2, dbp3), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Create medication indicator
table_data = table_data %>% mutate(meds = a_med)

# Define hypertension (NA preserved if BP missing)
table_data = table_data %>%
  mutate(htn = ifelse(!is.na(sbp) & !is.na(dbp), as.integer(sbp >= 130 | dbp >= 80), NA_integer_))

# Keep ids with entry visit
baseline = table_data %>% filter(tolower(visit_type) == "entry")
ids = unique(baseline$id)
table_data = table_data %>% filter(id %in% ids)

# Order again and define visit number
table_data = table_data %>% 
  arrange(id, visit_date) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(visit_number = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Baseline row
baseline = table_data %>% filter(visit_number == 1)

# Disease free at baseline (only htn=0 & meds=0)
baseline_df = baseline %>% filter(htn == 0 & meds == 0)

# Keep only disease free
table_data = table_data %>% filter(id %in% baseline_df$id)

# Event part A: incident hypertension or medication use (NA-safe)
table_data = table_data %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(
    event_A = as.integer(
      any(visit_number == 1 & (htn == 1 | meds == 1), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Event part B: two visits with hypertension (NA-safe)
table_data = table_data %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(
    event_B = as.integer(
      any(visit_number == 2 & (htn == 1 | meds == 1), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Person-years
entry_dates = table_data %>% group_by(id) %>% summarise(entry = min(visit_date))
last_dates = table_data %>% group_by(id) %>% summarise(last = max(visit_date))
py_df = entry_dates %>% inner_join(last_dates, by = "id") %>%
  mutate(py = as.numeric(last - entry) / 365)

# Unique person-level data
person_df = table_data %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(
    event_A = first(event_A),
    event_B = first(event_B),
    male = first(male),
    age = first(age)
  ) %>%
  left_join(py_df %>% select(id, py), by = "id") %>%
  ungroup()

# Age groups
person_df = person_df %>%
  mutate(age_group = case_when(
    age < 30 ~ "18-29 years",
    age < 40 ~ "30-39 years",
    age < 50 ~ "40-49 years",
    age < 60 ~ "50-59 years",
    TRUE ~ "60+ years"
  ))
```


```{R}
make_table_kable <- function(df, event_var) {
  
  table_rows <- list()
  
  # Total row
  n_total <- nrow(df)
  e_total <- sum(df[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  py_total <- sum(df$py, na.rm = TRUE)
  inc_total <- ifelse(py_total > 0, (e_total / py_total) * 1000, NA)
  
  table_rows[[1]] <- data.frame(
    Category = "**Total**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = n_total,
    `Events (n)` = e_total,
    `Person-Years` = round(py_total, 2),
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_total, 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Sex header row
  table_rows[[2]] <- data.frame(
    Category = "**Sex**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = "",
    `Events (n)` = "",
    `Person-Years` = "",
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Sex sub-rows
  for (sex in c(1,0)) {
    sub <- df[df$male == sex, ]
    py_sub <- sum(sub$py, na.rm = TRUE)
    inc_sub <- ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
    table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
      Category = ifelse(sex == 1, "Male", "Female"),
      `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
      `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      `Person-Years` = round(py_sub, 2),
      `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub, 2),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Age group header row
  table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
    Category = "**Age group**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = "",
    `Events (n)` = "",
    `Person-Years` = "",
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Age group sub-rows
  groups <- c("18-29 years","30-39 years","40-49 years","50-59 years","60+ years")
  for (g in groups) {
    sub <- df[df$age_group == g, ]
    if (nrow(sub) > 0) {
      py_sub <- sum(sub$py, na.rm = TRUE)
      inc_sub <- ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
      table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
        Category = g,
        `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
        `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
        `Person-Years` = round(py_sub, 2),
        `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub, 2),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Bind all rows
  out_table <- do.call(rbind, table_rows)
  
  # Column names
  colnames(out_table) <- c("Category","Disease Free (n)","Events (n)","Person-Years","Incidence per 1000 PYs")
  
  out_table %>%
    kbl(caption = paste0("Incident Hypertension - ", event_var),
        escape = FALSE,  # bold markdown works
        align = "lrrrr") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"))
}

# Part A table
make_table_kable(person_df, "event_A")

# Part B table
make_table_kable(person_df, "event_B")
```
